## Impact
- **Severity**: Critical
- **Likelihood**: High (already causing issues)
- **Affected Component**: Entire codebase
- **Risk**: Data integrity, reliability

## Recommended Solution
Implement Vitest testing framework with comprehensive coverage:

### 1. Install Dependencies
\`\`\`bash
npm install --save-dev vitest @vitest/ui c8
npm install --save-dev @types/supertest supertest
\`\`\`

### 2. Update package.json
\`\`\`json
"scripts": {
  "test": "vitest run",
  "test:watch": "vitest",
  "test:ui": "vitest --ui",
  "test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage"
}
\`\`\`

### 3. Create Test Files
- \`server.spec.ts\` - Integration tests for all endpoints
- \`auth.spec.ts\` - Authentication middleware tests
- \`validation.spec.ts\` - Schema validation tests
- \`batch.spec.ts\` - Batch processing logic tests

### 4. Minimum Test Coverage
- [ ] POST /v1/scans/batch - success cases
- [ ] POST /v1/scans/batch - validation errors
- [ ] POST /v1/scans/batch - idempotency
- [ ] Authentication - valid token
- [ ] Authentication - invalid token
- [ ] Authentication - missing token
- [ ] Health endpoints (GET / and /healthz)
- [ ] Graceful shutdown
- [ ] Database connection failure handling
- [ ] Transaction rollback on error

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Vitest installed and configured
- [ ] Minimum 70% code coverage
- [ ] All endpoints tested
- [ ] Authentication tests
- [ ] CI/CD integration (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Tests run before every deployment
- [ ] Coverage report generated

## References
- Vitest: https://vitest.dev/
- Fastify testing: https://fastify.dev/docs/latest/Guides/Testing/

## Estimated Effort
8-12 hours

## Priority
🔴 Critical - Complete within 2 weeks
